critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:
1. PROMOTION_CAMPAIGN_CONFOUND: Major creator campaign launched mid-rollout with independent watch-time mechanisms.
2. MIXED_ENTRYPOINT_MEASUREMENT: Home-feed and notification sessions pooled.
3. NO_LOG_REPLAY_COMPARISON: No fixed-traffic counterfactual evaluation.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE (seeing critique):
All three conceded. The model may be better on ordinary home-feed traffic; the aggregate metric cannot establish this. An entrypoint-separated or log-replay analysis is the correct test.
adjudication_raw: Full concession round 1. Empirical test agreed: model's quality on ordinary home-feed traffic needs to be measured separately from promotion and notification effects.

empirical_test.measure: Watch-time per session on home-feed-originated non-event-week sessions; log replay comparison
empirical_test.success_criterion: No meaningful improvement on home-feed non-event sessions
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Consistent improvement on home-feed non-event sessions in log replay
